name: Advance Global Capital Ltd.
description: Advance Global Capital Ltd. (AGC) is a global impact investment management company that believes private capital, when invested well, can be a force for good. AGC works with investors who want both risk-adjusted market-rate returns and measurable, positive impact that aligns with their values. Their flagship fund puts capital to work in underserved communities worldwide and delivers tailored financing to partners, and flexible working capital solutions to SMEs so they can grow and continue to positively impact their local economies.

# Meet Advance Global Capital
## Deep experience with global perspectives
Our team has deep expertise in global financial services, investment management, impact investing, and small business development. Headquartered in London with satellite presence in Cape Town, South Africa, our team represents a work culture that is diverse in its perspectives and backgrounds. All together our senior management team has several decades of combined experience working at AGC. We are passionate about the potential for private capital to make a difference. We collaborate with all of our stakeholders to leave local financial ecosystems better than how we found them.
#####  100%
women owned
#####  60%
women on the board
### Board of Directors
The Advance Global Capital Board of Directors has extensive experience in global financial services, investment management, and leadership in a wide range of not-for-profit boards and civic organizations. Leaders in their fields, the members of the board are keen investors and active participants in impact investing.
[ ![Hendrik Van Deventer](https://advanceglobalcap.com/wp-content/uploads/hendrik-van-deventer.jpg) ](https://advanceglobalcap.com/team/hendrik-van-deventer/)

### Senior Management Team
The Advance Global Capital (AGC) management team brings deep experience in the areas of investment management, trade finance, asset-based lending, foreign exchange management, impact investing, financial software and small business development, particularly in developing economies. With combined experience in nearly 100 countries, AGC has an extensive network of relationships worldwide.
[ ![Hendrik Van Deventer](https://advanceglobalcap.com/wp-content/uploads/hendrik-van-deventer.jpg) ](https://advanceglobalcap.com/team/hendrik-van-deventer/)

### Investment Committee
The Investment Committee makes decisions concerning selection of the investment and the exit route/repayment method for the funds’ assets. Senior Portfolio Managers identify investment opportunities and present them to the Investment Committee for consideration.

## Founder's Story
Janet McKinley believes that people who have more than enough money to take care of themselves and their families have a duty to invest in solutions that make the world a better place — a philosophy she can trace back to her early childhood. [Read more.](https://advanceglobalcap.com/about/founders-story/)
![janet-mckinley](https://advanceglobalcap.com/wp-content/uploads/janet-mckinley.webp)
### Alignment to Global Sustainability Standards
We are closely aligned with United Nations Sustainability Goals 5, 8, 9 and 10
![Sustainable Development Goals](https://advanceglobalcap.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/logo-sustainable-development-goals.png)
![Gender Equality](https://advanceglobalcap.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/logo-gender-equality.png)
![Decent Work and Economic Growth](https://advanceglobalcap.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/logo-decent-work-and-economic-growth.png)
![Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure](https://advanceglobalcap.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/logo-industry-innovation-and-infrastructure.png)
![Reduced Inequalities](https://advanceglobalcap.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/logo-reduced-inequalities.png)
### Latest: 2026 Impact Report
AGC’s annual Impact Report explores how working capital financing supports small businesses across emerging markets – and why access to liquidity remains critical to sustaining jobs, local commerce, and economic resilience.
[ Get the report ](https://docsend.com/v/qk7gf/websitelink-gm)
![](https://advanceglobalcap.com/wp-content/uploads/AGC-Impact-Report-Cover-1.jpg)

founders.name: Janet McKinley
founders.bio: Believes that people who have more than enough money to take care of themselves and their families have a duty to invest in solutions that make the world a better place.

tavily.answer:
Advance Global Capital Ltd.'s official website is https://advanceglobalcap.com/about. The company focuses on impact investing and provides financing to small and medium enterprises in emerging markets.
Advance Global Capital is a UK-based impact investment firm focused on providing private credit to SMEs in emerging markets. Founded in 2012, it has funded over $9 billion in receivables financing. The firm's CEO is Hendrik Van Deventer.
Advance Global Capital is a global impact investment firm founded in 2012, specializing in financing small and medium-sized enterprises in emerging markets. It has provided over $7 billion in financing to support local economic growth and create millions of jobs. The firm is based in London and focuses on impact investing and private credit.
Advance Global Capital is a global impact investment firm providing debt financing to SMEs in emerging markets. It focuses on financial inclusion and economic growth for women. Wellfound is a startup hiring platform for seed-stage companies.
Advance Global Capital is a UK-based impact investment firm providing debt financing to SMEs, focusing on financial inclusion and job creation, with over $7 billion in funding since 2012.
